title: Play
description: A single atomic play in the Score arc design system

cost.description: Cost tier: free | low (<$25) | mid ($25-100) | high ($100-500) | ongoing | varies | goodwill (social/relationship cost)

autonomy.description: Operational autonomy level: agent | human_assist | human_managed | confederate | confederate-assist | confederate-required | operator | ambient

lead_time.description: Days of setup required before deployment

arc_fit.description: Arc positions where this play fits (pre/open/build/escalate/threshold/climax/denouement/revelation/reinforcement/any)

beat_function.description: Beat shape function: spike | ramp | hold | rest | transition | liminal

somatic.description: Somatic effects: what the body does; what state is required

identity_invite.description: Identity invitation: who the participant becomes in this play

reinforce.description: How the effect reinforces over time

agency_demand.description: How much agency the participant must exercise

feedback_type.description: Type of feedback loop: none | responsive | diegetic | environmental | etc.

agency_type.description: Type of agency: revealed | constructed | borrowed | suspended | constrained | mirrored | emergent

frame_requirement.description: Frame requirement: naive | primed | any | meta

trope_risk.description: Risk of triggering genre tropes or breaking immersion

detection_window.description: How quickly participant might detect the artifice: immediate | short | medium | long | never_solo | session | none | transparent

reversibility.description: How reversible the play is: trivial | easy | difficult | irreversible | low | moderate | high

channel.description: Delivery channels (email, phone, in_person, physical_mail, digital_ambient, etc.)

dwell_time.description: How long the effect dwells: brief | session | multi-day | permanent | multi-session | arc-length

synergizes_with.description: Play IDs that synergize with this play (empty list if none)

contraindicated_after.description: Play IDs that this play should not follow (empty list if none)

landscape.description: Which plane the play operates on

failure_modes.description: List of failure modes (may be empty for older plays)

section.description: Library section this play belongs to (optional)

group_role.description: Group role type when play involves multiple participants (optional; solo is default)
